name: EasyCall Cursor Bridge
description: Launch Cursor Cloud Agents from OpenClaw chat messages and report PR results back to WhatsApp.

cursorApiKey.description: Cursor API key. Prefer CURSOR_API_KEY in the VPS environment.

cursorWebhookSecret.description: Shared secret used to verify Cursor webhook signatures. Prefer CURSOR_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

cursorWebhookUrl.description: Public HTTPS URL for this plugin's /hooks/cursor route.

startingRef.description: Default branch/ref Cursor agents start from.

modelId.description: Optional Cursor model id from GET /v1/models.

ownerWaid.description: Optional owner WhatsApp target in E.164 format, e.g. +972... If omitted, webhook results are logged instead of sent by WhatsApp.

whatsappAccount.description: Optional OpenClaw WhatsApp account id for multi-account setups.

openclawBin.description: OpenClaw CLI path used for outbound owner notifications.

statePath.description: Optional JSON fallback state path when OpenClaw runtime state is unavailable.

cursorWebhookField.description: Cursor create-agent request field used for webhook URL. Keep configurable while v1 API is beta.

easycallProductionNumber.description: EasyCall production PSTN number that manual voice QA calls should dial.

qaCallerNumber.description: Optional Twilio/OpenClaw caller number reserved for QA calls. The voice-call plugin usually owns the actual from number.

qaMaxDurationSeconds.description: Default max duration budget for manual voice QA calls.

qaNotifyMode.description: Where final voice QA reports are sent. Use log first; whatsapp requires ownerWaid and WhatsApp channel.

qaCallProvider.description: How voice QA calls are started. voicecall uses OpenClaw's voice-call plugin; twilio_say speaks once; twilio_gather runs a turn-based spoken QA conversation.

twilioAccountSid.description: Optional Twilio Account SID for the twilio_say fallback. Prefer TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID in the VPS environment.

twilioAuthToken.description: Optional Twilio Auth Token for the twilio_say fallback. Prefer TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN in the VPS environment.

qaPublicBaseUrl.description: Public HTTPS base URL for the bridge, used by Twilio Gather callbacks, e.g. https://openclaw.example.com.

qaGeminiApiKey.description: Optional Gemini API key used to generate next QA caller turns in twilio_gather mode. Prefer GEMINI_API_KEY.

qaMaxTurns.description: Maximum QA caller turns for twilio_gather conversations.
